{{Blurimage|file=Obj_49.jpeg|caption=A picture of the object taken in [REDACTED]|hovertext=cube}} == Description == Object 39 is a white cube known as ''Transportation Cube'' by the [[M.E.G]]. It has a physical size of 1 dm3 and due to its compounds made of 78% Iron (Fe) and 22% Tungsten (W), the cube weighs roughly around 5 kg. It's theorized that its origins are from Level 12, due to the cube's similarity in color and anomalous properties. Its use is to transport any humans or objects to a targeted level via one's command. The cube ha a special "parent level" phenomenon, the cube can't be brought out of the level it was discovered; however, there is only one recorded way possible. The cube must be put into a airtight seal (Vacuum Chamber) and exit the level without usage of the object. If one doesn't follow these procedures then the object will [[Phenomenon 26|disappear without a trace]]. It also should be noted once one uses the object, the individual(s) will experience a mild headache for around 30 minutes after the usage of the object as a sort of side-effect. The object also has a cooldown period where the individual(s) that were transported/used the object can't use the object for a week after the final usage. Tests done by [[M.E.G.]] and [[Backroom Colonists]], both physically and biologically, have shown that: * The object is resistant to any damage known to common materials. (corrosion, rusting, melting, etc.) * The object can only be used by humans, other entities cannot use the object. * The object cannot be replicated or disassembled in any way. * The object requires fuel to use. (read [[#Testing Log O-39-1|Testing Log O-39-1]]) Because of the usability of the object being very powerful, its distribution has been cut by a significant amount. This is to avoid any bad actors (especially enemies of such groups) to have the object in stock and use them to ambush key levels in The Backrooms. Powerful and research groups have an abundance of the object, which has led to the rarity of encounters with the object. Wanderers who encounter the object have been said to either use it themselves or sell it for survival resources in secret deals.
[[File:kauer.png|right|100px]] '''NOTICE:''' THIS SECTION OF THIS PAGE CONTAINS CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION. '''> Kauer Research Organization Section'''
'''> Close Kauer Research Organization Section'''
> Kauer Research Organization Section
The [[Kauer Research Organization]] has conducted many research in this particular object. And they have theorized that how the object works is by the fuel that is given and quantum tunneling. The fuel acts as the catalyst for the process of transportation and used to modify certain atoms in the individual(s) to transport them to their designated level. As quantum tunneling had happened with the invasion of the Partygoers, it's believed that it's the only explanation that their research has given.
==Usage== Before usage of the object, one must acquire 2 amounts of the objects listed in Testing Log O-39-1, and press a button on the cube. Afterwards, one will insert the said object to the chamber and close the chamber by pressing the button again. After a certain amount of time, the object will manifest and obtain its transportation properties. The usage of the object can be done by one/many touching the object. Then one must specify verbally the level the individual(s) intend to go to, and the object will manifest and transport the individual(s) to the level specified. Interestingly, the object vanishes upon the completion of transportation. For further information, please read [[#Testing Log O-39-1|Testing Log O-39-1]]. ==Locations== The object was first found in [https://backrooms.fandom.com/wiki/Level_12?oldid=1167450 Level 12], with it camouflaging itself with the nature of the level. And since then, many more encounters happen all throughout The Backrooms. Often appearing in unexpected areas or hard to reach areas. See the object's [[#Common Locations|common locations]] for more information. While present in any level in The Backrooms, it is more commonly found in [https://backrooms.fandom.com/wiki/Level_12?oldid=1167450 Level 12]. It is theorized that the object's origin is from Level 12, but has never been confirmed.
> Update as of 30-3-2026
Level 12 has mysteriously changed. The object does not show up in the [[Level 12|new version of Level 12]].
The object is very hard to find, often times only encountered by sheer luck. And because of the object's properties, it is also very hard to collect. Common levels which had previously an abundance of the object have fallen thin due to the seizure by many groups or even due to [[Phenomenon 12|The Flicker]], it is theorized that many still exist in [[Uncharted Territory]]. ===Common Locations=== The cube often appears in hidden areas not seen easily by the naked eye, but a pattern has been seen where the object could hide: * In a dark area of a level * Behind pillars * Corners of ceillings/floors * Stuck to a wall in a random part * May appear randomly when one trips (as the object that one tripped upon) * Inside furniture, typically drawers and cabinets that fit the object's size * Camouflaging within the level's nature ===Common Levels=== A list of levels where the cube is commonly found. Levels labeled in bold are sure to have a major amount. * [https://backrooms.fandom.com/wiki/Level_12?oldid=1167450 Level 12] (Last Encounter: 29-03-2026. Level mysteriously changed, not found in the current version) * '''[[Level 111]]''' (Last Encounter: 16-12-2025) * [[Level 151]] (Last Encounter: 19-05-2018, thought to be the final encounter) * [[Level 188]] (Last Encounter: 22-07-2017, final encounter * '''[[Level 15]]''' (Last Encounter: 02-01-2026, thought to be decreasing in amount significantly) ==Attached Information== ===Testing Log O-39-1=== '''> Testing Log O-39-1'''

More information will be provided on other objects as soon as possible.
===Testing Log O-39-2=== '''> Testing Log O-39-2: 22-12-2018'''
'''> Close Testing Log O-39-2: 22-12-2018'''
[START OF AUDIO LOG] '''Dr. Feymann Johnson:''' This is testing number 2 of Object 39, I am accompanied by Dr. William Andrews from the [[Backroom Colonists]]. '''Dr. William Andrews:''' We are currently in [[Level 1]], we are going to test this object and send myself to [[Level 4]]. '''Wanderer James Andrews:''' I'm at [[Level 4]] now, I can't wait to see my brother again. '''Dr. William Andrews:''' 3, 2, 1. Level 4! ''*static for 2 seconds*'' '''Dr. Feymann Johnson:''' He's gone. ''*static for 10 seconds*'' '''Wanderer James Andrews:''' He's here, we're all good. '''Dr. William Andrews:''' I can confirm that. '''Dr. Feymann Johnson:''' I'll meet you guys there, wait for me! [END OF AUDIO LOG]
